title: French Pungent Puff Pastry
description: A French-inspired puff pastry filled with creamy cheese and topped with a tangy frais.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Mix fromage, frais, and pungent in a bowl.
Spread the cheese mixture onto one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2 inch border.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the filling, pressing edges to seal.
Brush the pastry with egg wash and cut a few slits in the top.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
